T0298.title: Bank Card Broker
T0298.definition: An underground syndicate that illegally acquires and resells bank cards and identity information kits in bulk.
T0298.description: Card dealers collect complete sets of ID cards, bank cards, USB security keys, and phone numbers from cardholders through offline recruitment or online acquisition, then resell them at a premium to money laundering or fraud rings. These cards are used to receive, split, and transfer illicit funds, serving as the foundational tools for money laundering. Once a case is exposed, card dealers quickly cut off contact, significantly complicating fund tracing.

references.title: Global Underground Industry Upgrade Research: Underground OTP Bypass Models Go Stealth
